name: Us Gold Exchange
description_short: Gold and precious metals buyer in Detroit offering cash purchases of gold, jewelry, and scrap with fair pricing and knowledgeable staff.
description_long:
Us Gold Exchange is a gold dealer operating in the Vernor Junction area of Detroit, Michigan, located at 1904 Springwells Street. The business specializes in buying gold, jewelry, and scrap precious metals from consumers looking to sell or exchange items for cash. The company has built a reputation through consistent positive customer feedback and operates with a focus on fair market pricing and honest transactions in the precious metals buying space.

The business offers cash purchases of gold, jewelry, and scrap metals, with a stated commitment to providing "top dollar" for items. They provide free verification services to check whether gold or silver items are genuine, which they offer without requiring a purchase commitment. The company operates on a cash-only basis and is open seven days a week according to customer reviews. Staff are described as knowledgeable about precious metals and experienced in proper evaluation and pricing.

Us Gold Exchange distinguishes itself through owner Danny's reputation for offering higher prices than competitors in the Michigan area, with multiple customers noting they received significantly better offers here than at nearby shops. The business emphasizes honesty and transparency in transactions, refusing to engage in "bogus guarantees" or deceptive practices. They also promote themselves as LGBTQ-friendly and a trans safe space, offering wheelchair accessible parking and seating. The business has earned a 4.9-star rating across 61 reviews.

As a cash-only precious metals buyer, this business serves a specific consumer need but operates in the informal economy. While customer testimonials are overwhelmingly positive regarding fair pricing and honest dealings, the cash-only model and focus on physical precious metals means this is not a credit-building or financial services solution. The business does not offer loans, credit products, or financial planning—it is strictly a buyer of pre-owned precious metals.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Owner Danny consistently offers higher prices than competing local gold buyers, with customers reporting 2x better offers than nearby shops
Provides free verification of gold and silver authenticity without purchase obligation
Open 7 days a week according to customer reviews
Staff described as knowledgeable, experienced, and straightforward about precious metals evaluation
Explicitly certified as LGBTQ-friendly and trans safe space with accessible facilities
4.9-star rating from 61 verified reviews with consistent praise for fair pricing and honest dealings
Free street parking and free Wi-Fi available
cons: Cash-only payment method with no alternative payment options
Does not offer loans, credit products, or financial services—strictly a precious metals buyer
Limited to customers with physical gold/jewelry to sell; not applicable for those needing credit or short-term cash without collateral
No online selling option; requires in-person visit to 1904 Springwells Street location
Single location in Detroit limits accessibility for customers outside the area
best_for: Consumers with gold, jewelry, or precious metals to sell seeking fair market prices
People needing quick cash in exchange for physical precious metals without lengthy approval processes
LGBTQ+ and transgender customers seeking a verified safe and welcoming business environment
Buyers wanting to verify gold/silver authenticity before committing to a sale elsewhere
diagnosis: Us Gold Exchange is best for consumers who own physical gold, jewelry, or scrap precious metals and want to sell them for cash at competitive fair-market prices with honest, knowledgeable service. The main caveat is this is strictly a precious metals buyer—not a financial services company—so it only serves customers who already have items to sell, and cannot help with credit building, emergency loans, or traditional financial needs.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
